scripts.pkg:mac: npm run bundle && pkg dist/bundle.js -t node18-macos-x64,node18-macos-arm64 -o release/aeroweb-macos
scripts.pkg:win: npm run bundle && pkg dist/bundle.js -t node18-win-x64 -o release/aeroweb-win.exe
scripts.pkg:linux: npm run bundle && pkg dist/bundle.js -t node18-linux-x64 -o release/aeroweb-linux
scripts.pkg:all: npm run bundle && pkg dist/bundle.js -t node18-macos-x64,node18-macos-arm64,node18-win-x64,node18-linux-x64 --out-path release
